title: arenaria lanuginosa subsp. guatemalensis
intro: Arenaria lanuginosa subsp. guatemalensis, commonly known as Guatemala sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Guatemala sandwort include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as having antimicrobial and antifungal properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. Guatemala sandwort is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its expectorant and antitussive properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
